mapper.insert: INSERT INTO application_package ( disclosure_id, internal_no, package_type, file_name, file_ext, file_path, file_url, file_size, content_type, version_no, is_current, upload_user_id, upload_user_name, upload_time, confirm_status, remark, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{disclosureId}, #{internalNo}, #{packageType}, #{fileName}, #{fileExt}, #{filePath}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{contentType}, IFNULL(#{versionNo}, 1), IFNULL(#{isCurrent}, 1), #{uploadUserId}, #{uploadUserName}, NOW(), IFNULL(#{confirmStatus}, 'UNCONFIRMED'), #{remark}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE application_package SET is_current = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE disclosure_id = #{disclosureId} AND package_type = #{packageType} AND is_current = 1
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM application_package WHERE disclosure_id = #{disclosureId} AND package_type = #{packageType} AND is_current = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM application_package WHERE disclosure_id = #{disclosureId} AND is_current = 1 ORDER BY package_type
